name: Ratchthani Leasing Public Company Limited
summary: Ratchthani Leasing Public Company Limited, together with its subsidiary, provides hire-purchase and leasing services in Thailand. It operates through three segments: New Car, Used Car, and Others. The company provides super car, car, bike, truck, and taxi loans, as well as other loans. It also provides insurance brokerage services. The company was founded in 1988 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand. Ratchthani Leasing Public Company Limited operates as a subsidiary of Thanachart SPV1 Co., Ltd.
